n: Colours of Infinity: Tales of the Deep Gardens
no: I assume new games and skip the option to fix savefiles Colours of Infinity
sum: Standalone BG2 quest adding a new explorable garden area with encounters, puzzles, and a self-contained storyline. Part of the Colours of Infinity series.
